messages.content:
translate these lists to english:  
```  
CREATION_CATEGORIES = [
"文本简化 - 将复杂文本转换为简单语言，便于理解。",
"语言润色 - 提升文本表达流畅性，修正语法错误，优化词汇选择。",
"文本错误修改 - 修正给定文本中的语法、拼写及用词错误，确保语义清晰准确。",
"文本改写 - 对给定的文本进行语义保持性改写，实现表达方式或风格的转换。",
"社交媒体写作 - 针对特定场景和要求，撰写社交媒体类文本，如博客、论坛、播客文案。",
"个人介绍写作 - 针对特定场景和要求，撰写个人介绍类文本，如个人简历、个人陈述、自传。",
"操作和介绍性写作 - 针对特定场景和要求，撰写简洁、明确、具有操作性的说明或指导性文本，如技术方案文档、操作手册、使用说明文档、产品介绍、职位描述、菜谱。",
"功能性写作 - 针对特定场景和要求，撰写功能性文本，如邮件、工作周报、项目规划、法律文书、邀请帖。",
"说服性写作 - 根据特定场景和要求，撰写说服性文本，如演讲稿、新闻稿、辩论稿和市场营销材料。",
"创意写作 - 针对指定场景和要求，撰写文科类创作性文本，如小说、散文、歌词、诗词歌赋。",
"科学写作 - 针对指定场景和要求，撰写工科类文本，如研究型论文、技术论文、科学报告、案例报告。",
"推荐与建议 - 针对用户提出的问题和要求，提供个性化的推荐或解决问题的建议，如编程工具推荐、旅行建议、购物建议、推荐礼物、文娱推荐、没事推荐、健身指导和理财建议。",
"观点和意见 - 针对指定场景和要求，表达对给定主题的看法和意见，如价值观判断、哲学问题观点、辩论问题观点、各类评论意见。",
"扩写 - 针对指定场景和要求，在原有文本基础上，添加相关信息、细节或内容。",
]
  
NLP_CATEGORIES = [
"排序 - 对给定列表项进行逻辑或重要性排序。",
"分类 - 对输入文本进行分类，根据用户要求将文本准确划分至预设类别中。",
"文本翻译 - 将一种语言的文本准确转换成另一种语言，保持原意和语境。",
"数据处理与分析 - 对输入数据进行处理、分析或挖掘，提取有价值的信息和规律。",
"文本分析 - 识别和提取文本中的信息，并根据用户需求进行分析。如情感分析、语义分析和内容分析。",
"问题生成 - 生成针对给定主题的多样化问题。",
"阅读理解 - 阅读文本，理解内容，准确回答与文本相关的问题。",
"关键字抽取 - 从文本中准确识别并提取核心关键词。",
"文本总结 - 提炼文本核心内容，生成简洁连贯的摘要。例如博客总结、文章总结、论文总结和笔记总结等。",
]
  
CHAT_CATEGORIES = [
"闲聊 - 涉及无特定主题的随意对话。闲聊内容可以涵盖生活琐事、天气等日常话题。",
"网络流行语对话 - 涉及网络流行语或表情包的对话场景。",
"热门话题讨论 - 涉及当前的热门话题，例如时事新闻、电影、娱乐八卦、体育、科技动态等。",
"情感支持 - 涉及用户心情、情感和共情的对话。在用户表达情感（如快乐、悲伤、压力）时，提供适当的情感支持和安慰。",
"幽默对话 - 涉及幽默或玩笑式的对话。",
"角色扮演 - 扮演特定角色进行对话或完成用户指定的任务。",
]  
```

```python  
CREATION_CATEGORIES = [
    "Text Simplification - Convert complex text into simple language for easy understanding.",
    "Language Polishing - Enhance text fluency, correct grammatical errors, and optimize word choice.",
    "Text Error Correction - Correct grammatical, spelling, and word choice errors in the given text to ensure clarity and accuracy.",
    "Text Rewriting - Retain the semantic meaning of the given text while transforming its expression or style.",
    "Social Media Writing - Write social media texts, such as blog posts, forum entries, and podcast scripts, based on specific scenes and requirements.",
    "Personal Introduction Writing - Write personal introduction texts, such as resumes, personal statements, and autobiographies, based on specific scenes and requirements.",
    "Operational and Introductory Writing - Write concise, clear, and actionable instructions or guideline texts, such as technical documents, operation manuals, user guides, product descriptions, job descriptions, and recipes, based on specific scenes and requirements.",
    "Functional Writing - Write functional texts, such as emails, work reports, project plans, legal documents, and invitations, based on specific scenes and requirements.",
    "Persuasive Writing - Write persuasive texts, such as speeches, press releases, debate scripts, and marketing materials, based on specific scenes and requirements.",
    "Creative Writing - Write creative humanities texts, such as novels, essays, lyrics, and poems, based on specified scenes and requirements.",
    "Scientific Writing - Write technical texts, such as research papers, technical papers, scientific reports, and case reports, based on specified scenes and requirements.",
    "Recommendations and Suggestions - Provide personalized recommendations or problem-solving suggestions according to user queries and requirements, such as programming tool advice, travel advice, shopping tips, gift suggestions, entertainment recommendations, health guidance, and financial advice.",
    "Opinions and Views - Express opinions and perspectives on given topics, such as value judgments, philosophical views, debate opinions, and various commentary opinions, based on specified scenes and requirements.",
    "Elaboration - Add relevant information, details, or content to existing text based on specified scenes and requirements.",
]

NLP_CATEGORIES = [
    "Sorting - Arrange items in a given list based on logic or importance.",
    "Classification - Categorize input text, accurately dividing it into predefined categories based on user requirements.",
    "Text Translation - Accurately convert text from one language to another while maintaining original meaning and context.",
    "Data Processing and Analysis - Process, analyze, or mine input data to extract valuable information and patterns.",
    "Text Analysis - Identify and extract information from text and analyze it based on user needs, such as sentiment analysis, semantic analysis, and content analysis.",
    "Question Generation - Generate diverse questions on a given topic.",
    "Reading Comprehension - Read text, understand its content, and accurately answer questions related to the text.",
    "Keyword Extraction - Accurately identify and extract key keywords from the text.",
    "Text Summarization - Distill the core content of the text and generate concise summaries, such as blog summaries, article summaries, paper summaries, and note summaries.",
]

CHAT_CATEGORIES = [
    "Casual Chat - Engage in casual conversations without a specific topic, covering everyday topics like daily life, weather, etc.",
    "Internet Slang Chat - Engage in conversations involving internet slang or meme scenarios.",
    "Hot Topic Discussion - Discuss current hot topics such as current affairs, movies, celebrity gossip, sports, and technology trends.",
    "Emotional Support - Engage in conversations about user feelings, emotions, and empathy. Provide appropriate emotional support and comfort when users express emotions like happiness, sadness, or stress.",
    "Humorous Dialogue - Engage in humorous or joking conversations.",
    "Role-Playing - Engage in conversations or complete tasks by assuming specific roles."
]
```
